subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, Lord of Names and Creator of heaven! I beseech Thee by Thy Name which Thou hast made supreme over [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء اسئلک باسمک الذی جعلته مهیمنا علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer
